caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a white shirt, stands behind a podium delivering a speech. He is positioned against a textured, dark green wall featuring geometric recessed patterns. Two tall, slender glass cylinders containing decorative branches and small red flowers flank him. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man gesticulates with his hands to emphasize his points; he begins by extending his left hand, moves his right hand in a sweeping motion, briefly rests his hands on the podium, and finally raises both hands with palms facing inward. His facial expression remains focused and serious as he speaks, with his mouth open in several frames. The background and lighting remain consistent throughout the scene.
